text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 36 

HOP_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Hospital Outpatient Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for hospital outpatient (HOP) visits by a primary payer 
other than Medicare. It is the sum of all the primary payer amounts (NCH_PRMRY_PYR_CLM_PD_AMT 
from each claim) in the HOP setting for the year. The algorithm includes only claims that ended during
